chapter_title: 真人感窗口人像基准测试 V2

style_profile.global_positive: photorealistic, realistic skin texture, realistic skin pores, cinematic daylight, soft backlight, realistic depth of field, premium texture detail, realistic photography look
style_profile.global_negative: cartoon, 2d, painting, illustration, overprocessed beauty skin, plastic skin, low quality, worst quality, blurry, deformed anatomy, extra fingers, text, watermark

character_anchors.window_woman: beautiful East Asian woman, long brown-black hair, delicate facial proportions, brown eyes, natural lips, realistic eyelashes

scene_anchors.window_daylight: large bright window, grey curtain, soft daylight, wooden floor, indoor natural light, airy apartment interior

render_profile.notes: Prompt-tightened photoreal benchmark: same majicMIX v7 sampler settings as r01, but with stronger clothing constraints for red dress + black pantyhose and harder negatives against white wrap, bare shoulders, and cream fabric takeover.

panels.scene_description: near-real full-body portrait of an East Asian woman squatting by a bright window in a red dress and black pantyhose

prompt_build.local_positive: full-body composition, squatting pose, looking back toward camera, clearly wearing a fitted long-sleeve red dress made of visible red fabric, dress fully covering torso, waist and hips, black semi-sheer pantyhose clearly covering both legs, red ankle-strap high heels, soft smile, realistic skin, realistic knees and hands, bright window rim light, grey curtains, clean wood floor, shallow depth of field, natural feminine pose, very close to real photo, clothed fashion portrait, no fabric draped around body
prompt_build.local_negative: office props, smartphone, empty limbs, duplicate body parts, broken hands, anime face, heavy cel shading, exaggerated giant eyes, posterized skin, oversharpened edges, white cloth, cream cloth, beige cloth, blanket, towel, shawl, wrap dress made from loose fabric, nude shoulder wrap, exposed shoulders, off-shoulder cream garment, white dress, ivory dress, bathrobe

narration: 这一版只做一件事：把红裙和黑丝袜锁得更死。

bubble_plan.text: 这一版只做一件事：把红裙和黑丝袜锁得更死。
